Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements. Statements: All hens are dogs. All dogs are peacocks. Conclusions: I. All hens are peacocks. II. All peacocks are dogs.
options: Neither conclusion I nor II follows
Both conclusions I and II follow
